ItacPersonItem.Notes: Pignoria writes to Pietro Gualdo in Venice about his emblem in the Ricovrati Academy, in Lettere d`uomini illustri, (1744), pp. 29, 80. Pignoria`s portrait is taken from Tomasini, Elogia virorum (1644)
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
